action:
import pyautogui
import time
'''
Observation:


Thought:
看到输入框已经准备就绪了，光标正在闪烁等待输入。我需要把苹果提供的那个视频链接复制进去，这样VLC就能开始播放了。让我把https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8这个地址粘贴到输入框中。
'''

import pyperclip
pyperclip.copy('https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8')
pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'v')
time.sleep(0.5)

Action: type(content='https://devstreaming-cdn.apple.com/videos/streaming/examples/img_bipbop_adv_example_fmp4/master.m3u8')
